chunks.title: Psalm of Supplication and Forgiveness
chunks.reason: The psalmist cries out from the depths, acknowledges God's forgiveness as the basis for fear, and establishes the theme of hope.

chunks.title: Psalm of Waiting and Hope
chunks.reason: The speaker expresses deep personal hope in Yahweh's word using the metaphor of watchmen waiting for morning.

chunks.title: Call to Israel and Promise of Redemption
chunks.reason: The text shifts from personal expression to a communal call for Israel to wait on God, concluding with the promise of redemption.
